SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.fire

Class Api537FlareFlameModel

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.fire.Api537FlareFlameModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Api537FlareFlameModel extends Object implements Serializable
API 537 / API 521 elevated-flare flame and radiation model with wind tilt and noise.

Computes, for an elevated (stack) flare:

  • Flame length from the total heat release (Kent 1968 / API 521 §6 correlation, L = 0.00326 · Q^0.478, Q in W, L in m)
  • Wind-tilt trajectory of the flame (Brzustowski & Sommer): tilt from the resultant of the jet exit momentum and the cross-wind, giving the flame-centre and flame-tip coordinates
  • Sterile-zone iso-flux radii for the API 521 §6 design levels (1.58 / 4.73 / 6.3 / 9.46 kW/m²) using a point source located at the flame centre
  • Flare noise: sound power level (PWL) from acoustic efficiency and far-field sound pressure level (SPL) with spherical spreading per API 537

References: API STD 521 §6 (Flares — sizing, radiation and sterile area), API STD 537 (Flare Details for General Refinery and Petrochemical Service — flame length, radiation, noise), Brzustowski T.A. & Sommer E.C. (1973), Kent G.R. (1968) Hydrocarbon Processing.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

    API 521 §6 4.73 kW/m² (permissible for emergency actions, ~3 min exposure).

    API 521 §6 6.3 kW/m² (permissible for short exposure, escape).

    API 521 §6 9.46 kW/m² (permissible at equipment where emergency action lasting up to 30 s may be required).

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Api537FlareFlameModel(double massFlowKgPerS, double heatOfCombustionJPerKg, double radiativeFraction, double exitVelocityMPerS)
    Construct an elevated-flare flame model.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    double
    equivalentFlameTemperatureK()
    Equivalent black-body flame surface temperature for reference (radiative power over flame surface).
    double
    flameCenterHeightM()
    Vertical coordinate of the flame centre above grade.
    double
    flameCenterHorizontalM()
    Horizontal coordinate of the flame centre relative to the stack base (downwind positive).
    double
    flameLengthM()
    Flame length from total heat release (Kent 1968 / API 521 §6): L = 0.00326 · Q^0.478.
    double
    flameTiltRad()
    Flame tilt angle from the vertical due to cross-wind (Brzustowski & Sommer), from the resultant of the jet exit velocity and the wind velocity.
    double
    flameTipHeightM()
    Vertical coordinate of the flame tip above grade.
    double
    flameTipHorizontalM()
    Horizontal coordinate of the flame tip relative to the stack base (downwind positive).
    double
    heatFluxAtGroundDistance(double groundDistanceM)
    Incident radiation heat flux at a grade-level receiver located a horizontal distance from the stack base, using a point source at the flame centre.
    Api537FlareFlameModel
    setAcousticEfficiency(double eta)
    Set the acoustic efficiency (fraction of heat release converted to sound power, default 3e-6 per API 537).
    Api537FlareFlameModel
    setStackHeightM(double stackHeightM)
    Set the flare-tip elevation above grade (default 30 m).
    Api537FlareFlameModel
    setTransmissivity(double tau)
    Set atmospheric transmissivity used in the radiation calculation (default 1.0).
    Api537FlareFlameModel
    setWindSpeedMPerS(double windSpeedMPerS)
    Set the cross-wind speed at the flare tip (default 0 m/s, i.e. vertical flame).
    double
    soundPowerLevelDb()
    Acoustic sound power level (PWL) of the flare per API 537.
    double
    soundPressureLevelDb(double distanceM)
    Far-field sound pressure level (SPL) at a distance from the flame, assuming spherical spreading per API 537: SPL = PWL − 20·log10(d) − 11.
    double
    sterileZoneRadiusM(double targetFluxWPerM2)
    Sterile-zone radius (horizontal distance from the stack base, at grade) for a target incident heat flux.
    String
    summary()
    Build a brief human-readable summary.
    double
    totalHeatReleaseW()
    Total heat release Q = m_dot · ΔHc.
    double
    totalRadiativePowerW()
    Total radiative power Q_rad = η · Q.

  • Constructor Details

    • Api537FlareFlameModel

      public Api537FlareFlameModel(double massFlowKgPerS, double heatOfCombustionJPerKg, double radiativeFraction, double exitVelocityMPerS)
      Construct an elevated-flare flame model.
      Parameters:
      massFlowKgPerS - flared mass flow in kg/s
      heatOfCombustionJPerKg - fuel lower heating value in J/kg
      radiativeFraction - fraction of combustion heat radiated (natural gas ≈ 0.20)
      exitVelocityMPerS - flare-tip gas exit velocity in m/s

  • Method Details

    • setStackHeightM

      public Api537FlareFlameModel setStackHeightM(double stackHeightM)
      Set the flare-tip elevation above grade (default 30 m).
      Parameters:
      stackHeightM - stack height in m
      Returns:
      this model for chaining

    • setWindSpeedMPerS

      public Api537FlareFlameModel setWindSpeedMPerS(double windSpeedMPerS)
      Set the cross-wind speed at the flare tip (default 0 m/s, i.e. vertical flame).
      Parameters:
      windSpeedMPerS - wind speed in m/s
      Returns:
      this model for chaining

    • setTransmissivity

      public Api537FlareFlameModel setTransmissivity(double tau)
      Set atmospheric transmissivity used in the radiation calculation (default 1.0).
      Parameters:
      tau - transmissivity in [0,1]
      Returns:
      this model for chaining

    • setAcousticEfficiency

      public Api537FlareFlameModel setAcousticEfficiency(double eta)
      Set the acoustic efficiency (fraction of heat release converted to sound power, default 3e-6 per API 537).
      Parameters:
      eta - acoustic efficiency
      Returns:
      this model for chaining

      public double totalHeatReleaseW()
      Total heat release Q = m_dot · ΔHc.
      Returns:

      Total radiative power Q_rad = η · Q.

      radiative power in W

      Flame length from total heat release (Kent 1968 / API 521 §6): L = 0.00326 · Q^0.478.
      Returns:
      flame length in m

    • flameTiltRad

      public double flameTiltRad()
      Flame tilt angle from the vertical due to cross-wind (Brzustowski & Sommer), from the resultant of the jet exit velocity and the wind velocity.
      Returns:
      tilt angle from vertical in radians

      public double flameCenterHorizontalM()
      Horizontal coordinate of the flame centre relative to the stack base (downwind positive).
      Returns:
      flame-centre horizontal offset in m

    • flameCenterHeightM

      public double flameCenterHeightM()
      Vertical coordinate of the flame centre above grade.
      Returns:
      flame-centre height in m

    • flameTipHorizontalM

      public double flameTipHorizontalM()
      Horizontal coordinate of the flame tip relative to the stack base (downwind positive).
      Returns:
      flame-tip horizontal offset in m

    • flameTipHeightM

      public double flameTipHeightM()
      Vertical coordinate of the flame tip above grade.
      Returns:
      flame-tip height in m

    • heatFluxAtGroundDistance

      public double heatFluxAtGroundDistance(double groundDistanceM)
      Incident radiation heat flux at a grade-level receiver located a horizontal distance from the stack base, using a point source at the flame centre.
      Parameters:
      groundDistanceM - horizontal distance from the stack base in m
      Returns:
      incident heat flux in W/m²

    • sterileZoneRadiusM

      public double sterileZoneRadiusM(double targetFluxWPerM2)
      Sterile-zone radius (horizontal distance from the stack base, at grade) for a target incident heat flux. Returns 0 if the target flux is never reached even directly under the flame.
      Parameters:
      targetFluxWPerM2 - target incident heat flux in W/m²
      Returns:
      horizontal sterile-zone radius in m

    • soundPowerLevelDb

      public double soundPowerLevelDb()
      Acoustic sound power level (PWL) of the flare per API 537.
      Returns:
      sound power level in dB (re 1e-12 W)

    • soundPressureLevelDb

      public double soundPressureLevelDb(double distanceM)
      Far-field sound pressure level (SPL) at a distance from the flame, assuming spherical spreading per API 537: SPL = PWL − 20·log10(d) − 11.
      Parameters:
      distanceM - distance from the flame in m
      Returns:
      sound pressure level in dB (re 20 µPa)

    • equivalentFlameTemperatureK

      public double equivalentFlameTemperatureK()
      Equivalent black-body flame surface temperature for reference (radiative power over flame surface).
      Returns:
      flame surface temperature in K

    • summary

      public String summary()
      Build a brief human-readable summary.
      Returns:
      summary string
